form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing fifth behind Charlie Cheeks at this track over 1609m in a 5yo on March 29 at $2.75. Then a handy effort when a close third behind Hercules at this track over 1609m in a 5yo on April 6 at $4.35. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Last start 7th over 1609m at this track, at the bell was 6th- beaten 9 m by The Hitman Heart (1:56.10) in 5yo on April 6 at $38.70. Recent form okay so worth some thought.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 1.75 m as favourite at this track (1:56.40) beating Rico Tubbs in 5yo on April 6 at $1.60 at the bell was leading.
